army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy

archetypes.name: Chamber of Purity
archetypes.description:
- Purifier Squads can be taken as Troops.
- All other Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Hall of Champions
archetypes.description:
- Paladin Squads can be taken as Troops.
- All other Troops become Elite choices.

legacies.name: Blades of Victory
legacies.description: All Psykers know the "Inescapable Pursuit" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Exactors
legacies.description: All Psykers know the "Purge Soul" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Prescient Brethren
legacies.description: All Psykers know the "Fatal Precognition" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Preservers
legacies.description: All Psykers know the "Aegis Eternal" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Rapiers
legacies.description: All Psykers know the "Symphonic Strike" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Silver Blades
legacies.description: All Psykers know the "Temporal Accuracy" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Swordbearers
